steps.title: Spot the scope signal
steps.content: The phrase “her many accomplishments include” followed by four distinct roles—professor, poet, grammar book author, institute co-founder—is the key signal. It tells us the blank should describe the breadth and range demonstrated by these varied examples.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the blank
steps.content: ”Extensive” directly fits—her accomplishments span four distinct domains: academic, literary, scholarly, and institutional. The other three choices either describe attributes the passage doesn't emphasize, contradict the passage's positive tone, or overstate the scope. That matches choice C — C is correct.
